utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Ok , so it is just because it was my table , I have to buy a new one ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_it is just because it was my table , I have to buy a new one

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That is the rule .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: What rule ? There is no rule , if anything , you owe me a table !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: How would you get to that ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I believe the piece of furniture was fine until your little breakfast adventure with Angela Delvecchio .

emotion_cause.span: 5_the piece of furniture was fine until your little breakfast adventure with Angela Delvecchio

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You knew about that ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , let just say the impressions you made in the butter left little to the imagination .

emotion_cause.span: 7_the impressions you made in the butter

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ok , ok , How about if we split it ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: What do you mean , like , buy it together ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You think we are ready for something like that ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Why not ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , it is a pretty big commitment , I mean , what if one of us wants to move out ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Why , are you moving out ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_what if one of us wants to move out ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am not moving out .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You would tell me if you were moving out right

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , yeah , it is just that with my last roommate Kip ...

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Aw , I know all about Kip !

emotion_cause.span: 17_it is just that with my last roommate Kip ...

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: It is just that we bought a hibachi together , and then he ran off and got married , and things got pretty ugly .

emotion_cause.span: 19_we bought a hibachi together , and then he ran off and got married , and things got pretty ugly .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , let me ask you something , was Kip a better roommate than me ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Aw , do not do that
